title: NAD's Animated Jukebox X Bare Bones
description: Adaptation to Bare Bones to this new jukebox created by NerdAmethyst
body:
I have been using [NAD's Animated Jukebox](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/nad-s-animated-jukebox/) for sometime know, and because I like to use the Bare Bones, I adapted the jukebox to fit the style.

Now if you play with Bare Bones, you still can use this amazing new look to Jukebox made by NerdAmethyst.

Contact me on my discord (seiyadipessego) if you have any problem with it.
